3285880.name: MONOMOON
3285880.description:
MONOMOON is a tiny game about exploration and discovery.

With no proper instructions, you must deduce and achieve your goals as you solve puzzles, find mysterious items, and uncover secrets hiding right under your nose. 

Features

  • Explore a small open world "Metroidbrainia" that you can (probably) complete in a few hours, or dig deeper to find all that's hidden within.

  • Layers of secrets, ranging from simple puzzles to cryptic mysteries and hidden game mechanics.

  • A mix of platformer and point and click control schemes, utilizing both the keyboard and mouse. (Controllers are also supported)

  • Nonlinear exploration and progression - explore and discover things at your own pace.

  • All puzzles and secrets can be solved by playing the game solo, and all clues exist within the game itself. However, we encourage discussing your playthrough with a friend to share knowledge and hints with one another.
3285880.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语, 韩语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 繁体中文
